ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "num_pregnancies" INTEGER /* Number of previous pregnancies */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Pregnancy outcome classification (1 for positive, 0 for negative) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (e.g., Female, Male, Other) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's contact number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient registered with the system */,
  "last_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the patient's last visit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the metric belongs to */,
  "pg2" INTEGER /* Plasma glucose concentration after 2 hours in an oral glucose tolerance test */,
  "dbp" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure (mm Hg) */,
  "tsft" INTEGER /* Triceps skin fold thickness (mm) */,
  "si2" REAL /* 2-Hour serum insulin (mu U/ml) */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body mass index (weight in kg/(height in m)^2) */,
  "dpf" REAL /* Diabetes pedigree function */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the health metrics were measured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pregnancy_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pregnancy outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the outcome belongs to */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Pregnancy outcome (e.g., Positive, Negative) */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the pregnancy outcome */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pregnancy_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blood_pressure" (
  "bp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blood pressure reading */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the reading belongs to */,
  "systolic" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure (mm Hg) */,
  "diastolic" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure (mm Hg) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the blood pressure was measured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_pressure_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skin_fold_thickness" (
  "sft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skin fold thickness measurement */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the measurement belongs to */,
  "triceps" INTEGER /* Triceps skin fold thickness (mm) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the skin fold thickness was measured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skin_fold_thickness_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "serum_insulin" (
  "si_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each serum insulin level */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the level belongs to */,
  "level" INTEGER /* 2-Hour serum insulin (mu U/ml) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the serum insulin level was measured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("si_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_serum_insulin_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_mass_index" (
  "bmi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BMI value */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Body mass index (weight in kg/(height in m)^2) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the BMI was measured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bmi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_body_mass_index_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diabetes_pedigree_function" (
  "dpf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DPF value */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the value belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Diabetes pedigree function */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the DPF was measured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dpf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diabetes_pedigree_function_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data is being accessed */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the patient data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_access_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_access_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Full name of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the healthcare provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Provider's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Provider's contact number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Provider's email address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)
